title: web-ai-showcase goals backlog (goals.json)
description: Additive backlog fed by critique followUpGoals. The routine consumes it to pick the next ADDITIVE demo or targeted in-place fix — never to replace a stable published page.

id.description: Stable goal id (demo + hash of goal text).

demo.description: The model slug the goal relates to.

kind.description: additive-demo = a NEW page/slug; targeted-fix = smallest in-place patch on the existing demo. Never a rewrite/replace.

source.description: Where the goal came from (critique revision / responsive audit / manual).
